scripts.build: tsc && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r css dist/ && cp -r images dist/ && sed -i '' 's|src="dist/main.js"|src="main.js"|g' dist/index.html && sed -i '' 's|href="css/|href="css/|g' dist/index.html
scripts.start: tsc && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r css dist/ && cp -r images dist/ && sed -i '' 's|src="dist/main.js"|src="main.js"|g' dist/index.html && python3 -m http.server 8000
